Video.summary: How to get factory-match paint for your ’69 Dodge Dart. Color mixing tips for Project Bullseye.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Match Game

Video.summary: Installing front and back suspension on a 1969 Dodge Dart, with tips for control, safety, and style.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Suspension Installation

Video.summary: We're making real progress on Project Bullseye, our '69 Dodge Dart, with suspension, wiring, and paint.
Video.title: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Image.alt: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Video.summary: With its rear axle installed, new tires mounted, and trim blacked out, our 1969 Dart is now on all fours.
Video.title: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Image.alt: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Video.summary: Project Bullseye gets a power upgrade, brakes, steering, painted scooped hood, and Swinger stripe.
Video.title: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Image.alt: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Video.summary: We begin the transformation of a tired 1970 Monte Carlo into a modernized G-Machine.
Video.title: '70 Monte Carlo Part 1

Video.summary: MuscleCar gets a hand from HorsePower Mike in stiffening the frame on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 2

Video.summary: As we resume work on our 1966 Chevy Nova, we learn that this project may go from Starstruck to Struck Out.
Video.title: Project Struck Out / 69 GTO Part 1

Video.summary: The warden's calling for diagnostics for Detroit Muscle's next prisoner, their 1969 Pontiac GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 2 - Medical Checkup

Video.summary: Our 1969 Pontiac GTO needs to bulk up before breaking out so we modify the chassis and install new fuel lines.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 3 - Yard Time

Video.summary: Project Henchman is hoping to get a new look with a new paint job that'll make this '69 Pontiac GTO shine.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 4 - Prison Tats

Video.summary: The 1969 GTO Project Henchman gets a shiny new exterior look.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 5 - New Chains

Video.summary: Steel meets style – Today the boys finally lay down some paint on their ’69 GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel install a new third pedal and show you the do’s and don’ts on how to bleed the transmission
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 7 - Midnight Masterpiece

Video.summary: The guys enter the winding maze of wiring as they install a new ECU on Project Henchman.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 8 - Power Moves

Video.summary: GTO gets new exhaust and wheels, plus learn how to adjust wheel offset.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Video.summary: We upgrade a '69 GTO with new glass, power windows, and a complete interior makeover.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 10 – Pane Relief

Video.summary: 1969 GTO Project Henchman's first drive! Installing a spoiler, stripes & 3D-printed pieces.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 11 – Black Beauty

Video.summary: MuscleCar demonstrates how to get rid of a gnarly old Vinyl Top on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 3

Video.summary: It's time for the finishing touches on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Finale

Video.summary: The guys begin a tribute build to one of the most legendary muscle cars ever made: a 1969 ZL1 COPO Camaro.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO

Video.summary: An all-aluminum ZL1 Big Block gets plugged into the '69 COPO Camaro tribute.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install

Image.alt: NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install
NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install
NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install

Video.summary: Work continues on the COPO Camaro tribute project as the guys get to work building a new suspension system.
Video.title: COPO Camaro Suspension

Video.summary: The guys plug in their revamped front and rear, then modify the car to accept manual floor pedals.
Video.title: COPO Camaro Gains its Feet

Video.summary: Learn how you can improve on the classic Muncie 4-Speed with modern technology.
Video.title: COPO Camaro 4-Speed Build

Video.summary: The MuscleCar guys work on getting the interior into the 1969 COPO Camaro Tribute project.
Video.title: COPO Interior and Exhaust

Video.summary: We finalize the COPO Camaro by doing a quick rundown on firing a crate motor for the first time.
Video.title: COPO to Go!

Video.summary: Performance upgrades on our 6.7L Ram continue with install of larger intercooler, & gauges.
Video.title: Ram 3500 Stage One: Gauges & Intercooler

Video.summary: The Ram 1 ton dually gets a bigger badder turbo setup with more airflow for more horsepower. Plus, Advanced P
Video.title: Ram Diesel Turbo Swap & Exhaust

Video.summary: We've up'd the horsepower of our 2016 Ram dually with the air side of things, now onto fuel.
Video.title: Ram Diesel Fuel System Upgrades

Video.summary: Ever wonder how a performance transmission can withstand 800 horsepower?
Video.title: Ram 3500 Bullet-Proof Transmission

Video.summary: Final top end mods, rear locker & traction bars installed before our 1 ton dually hits the strip.
Video.title: Traction Bars for a Ram 3500 Dually

Image.alt: Traction Bars for a Ram 3500 Dually
Traction Bars for a Ram 3500 Dually
Traction Bars for a Ram 3500 Dually

Video.summary: Judgement day for our Ram dually on both the dyno and dragstrip.
Video.title: Dually Draggin' a Ram 3500 Cummins Turbo Diesel

Image.alt: Dually Draggin' a Ram 3500 Cummins Turbo Diesel
Dually Draggin' a Ram 3500 Cummins Turbo Diesel
Dually Draggin' a Ram 3500 Cummins Turbo Diesel

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc head out to salvage an old B-Body that has seen better days.
Video.title: Salvage Yard Special

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get cracking on a true piece of 90s muscle, their 1990 Mustang.
Video.title: Stumbling Out the Gate

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get to work on their 1990 Mustang installing a new front and rear suspension.
Video.title: A Pair of New Horseshoes

Video.summary: It's time to triple the horsepower in our 1990 Mustang! Project Fast Lane Fox Body is getting a new heart.
Video.title: This Horse Has Horsepower

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton's 1990 Mustang is about to undergo a major transformation with a new widebody kit.
Video.title: A Bit of Plastic Surgery

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton are set to get their new five-speed transmission into their Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Open Heart Surgery

Video.summary: It's all about the looks as Tommy and Peyton start on the interior changes to their 1990 Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Saddled Up

Video.summary: It's a blast from the past when project Fast Lane finally sings.
Video.title: The Ice Horse

Video.summary: We reveal plans to transform a '61 Chevy Impala into "Red Sled." Then an appraisal on the finished LeMans.
Video.title: Project Red Sled Debut

Video.summary: '61 Impala frame enforcement, Air Ride suspension system installation, and driving Year One's '67 Mustang.
Video.title: '61 Impala - Red Sled Frame Work

Video.summary: We're revamping a 1966 Ford Bronco with a new engine and drive train, prepping it for the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Drive Train

Video.summary: We delve into reconstructing our rusty '66 Ford Bronco amidst extensive repairs and modern upgrades.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Image.alt: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse, the ’66 bronco, is back from the paint shop and looking good.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Paint

Video.summary: Crazy Horse is going together fast with everything from seats, to roll bar, to fender flares.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Seats

Video.summary: The final touches are added to Project Crazy Horse: winch, bumpers, and lights.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Completion

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse is let loose on the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Special

Video.summary: We're fitting our 509 cubic inch Big Block into its new 1956 Chevrolet 210 home.
Video.title: ’56 Chevy Goes Gasser

Video.summary: The Engine Power team takes a '73 Split-Bumper Chevy Camaro and turns it into a triple threat car.
Video.title: Triple Threat Camaro

Video.summary: We take a '89 full size 4x4 Chevy Blazer on a trail ride, then tear it down and build the ultimate truck.
Video.title: Klassy K5

Video.summary: We powder coat a 61 Impala's frame and explore the allure of a 67 Corvette Stingray.
Video.title: '61 Impala - Red Sled Bodywork

Video.summary: We continue on a 1969 Firebird, taking off the rusty sub-frame and modifying the Impala, known as 'Red Sled'.
Video.title: Red Sled Sheet Metal

Video.summary: We tackle rust and lead filler removal on the 1961 Impala, restoring its trunk and body panels.
Video.title: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Image.alt: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Video.summary: We revamp a classic Impala with a 409 engine and hit the Year One Experience for muscle car fun.
Video.title: Red Sled gets a 409

Video.summary: Rick and Tommy finish Red Sled's steering, clutch and Air Ride systems. Learn how to rebuild a starter.
Video.title: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Image.alt: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Video.summary: Red Sled is finished. Look back at the entire build, and ride along on her maiden voyage.
Video.title: Red Sled Hits the Road
